case_title: JONATHAN SUN VS. DENNIS AUTO REPAIR LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,590.00 FILED BY SUN, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO AUG-22-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN SUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DENNIS CHANG, PRESIDENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR LLC
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR INTERPRETERS: MADARIN & CANTONESE
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: SERVED OWNER DENNIS CHANG SERVED JUL-14-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN SUN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. PLAINTIFF WITNESS XIAO CHUAN SUN PENG (WIFE) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNISE AUTO REPAIR LLC, REPRESENTED BY DENNIS CHANG (PRESIDENT) IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER JEFF DINN. PLAINTIFF'S STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS EXPIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
